primary_tests: Zoom nearest/bilinear 0.5x and 2x; Average; Gaussian variance 1 and 3; Sobel; Prewitt; Local Histogram Equalization
expected_result: Edges, gradients, fine checker detail, and smoothing/edge effects should be visually obvious
Black/white impulse dots should reduce strongly, especially with 5x5
Local contrast should improve; smaller blocks may look harsher/blockier
Erosion shrinks/weakens blobs and removes dots; dilation expands blobs and closes small gaps

primary_tests: BMP loading; same basic filters as clean PNG
expected_result: Should load and behave like the PNG after grayscale conversion
App should show a controlled error, not crash
App should reject/raise controlled load error, not crash
Should load grayscale CT image and display metadata
